description_long: This object consists of a set of six circular weight plates, each with a central hole for mounting on a barbell. The plates are arranged in two rows, with the larger plates at the back and smaller ones in front, and each plate is marked with its weight in pounds (LB) and the word 'BARBELL' in bold white lettering. The plates are uniformly black with a matte finish, and the text is clearly visible, providing a strong contrast. The edges of the plates are slightly beveled, and the surfaces appear smooth and hard, typical of cast iron or steel gym weights. There are no visible handles or grip holes on the plates, indicating a classic solid disc design. The set is likely intended for use in weightlifting or strength training, commonly found in gyms, garages, or urban fitness parks.
description: A set of six black, solid circular weight plates with white lettering, arranged by size and marked with their weight in pounds. The plates have a smooth, hard surface and a classic gym design.
description_view_0: Front view showing all six weight plates, with clear visibility of the white 'BARBELL' text and weight markings.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the thickness and beveled edges of the plates, with the central holes visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the plates, with the largest plates most prominent and the text partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the arrangement and relative sizes of the plates, with the central holes and edge details visible.
attribute_knurled_grip_pattern: No knurled grip pattern present; plates are smooth with no textured grip areas.
attribute_presence_of_weight_plates: Six weight plates present, ranging from small to large, all with central holes and white markings.
attribute_central_rotating_sleeve: No central rotating sleeve visible; only weight plates are shown.
attribute_end_cap_design: No end caps present; only the flat, circular faces of the weight plates are visible.
